omcp-trace.description: Append-only causal trace storage with summary + timeline queries

omcp-project-memory.description: Long-lived project memory: notes, directives, structured data

omcp-loop.description: Recurring task scheduler (loop_schedule/list_pending/check_due/cancel/mark_fired). Companion watcher: scripts/omcp-loop-watcher.mjs

omcp-code-intel.description: Code intelligence: lsp_diagnostics(_directory), lsp_document/workspace_symbols, lsp_hover, lsp_find_references, lsp_servers, ast_grep_search, ast_grep_replace. Wraps tsc, ast-grep, grep.

omcp-wiki.description: LLM Wiki knowledge base (wiki_ingest/query/lint/add/list/read/delete). Backed by .omcp/wiki/*.md with auto-maintained index.
